run.comment: I will get 1x... eventually. I'm resting for now
If you absolutely locked in you could probably 1x, but considering that would require a god tier titan that won't be happening soon

I want to run this again knowing Titan is the smallest timeloss there is because I hit Z in the correct time window of 0.033s.

Maybe if I get very sweet one day i'll run it back idk

I don't want to run this again knowing Titan is the biggest timeloss there is just because I hit Z 0.033 seconds too early.

Maybe if i get very salty one day i'll run it back idk
